project.name: todo-app-dev
project.description: Development repository for todo-app-dev that references the launchpad-frontend submodule (YorkIE-Launchpad/todo-app) for the actual frontend application code.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Root project documentation that identifies this repository as todo-app-dev, an auto-generated development wrapper repository.
nodes.description: Provides the top-level project title and a brief note that this is an auto-generated repository for todo-app-dev. Serves as the entry point for understanding the repository's purpose before exploring submodule configuration.

nodes.name: .gitmodules
nodes.summary: Git submodule configuration that links the launchpad-frontend submodule to the YorkIE-Launchpad/todo-app repository.
nodes.description: Defines a single submodule named launchpad-frontend checked out at path launchpad-frontend, pointing to https://github.com/YorkIE-Launchpad/todo-app.git. This file is the structural bridge between the development wrapper repo and the actual frontend application source.

nodes.name: .understandignore
nodes.summary: Understand-Anything ignore patterns file that controls which files are excluded from knowledge graph analysis.
nodes.description: Contains glob patterns (same syntax as .gitignore) for excluding files and directories from the Understand-Anything scan pipeline. Currently contains only the header comment with no active exclusion patterns.

nodes.name: launchpad-frontend
nodes.summary: Git submodule that holds the todo-app frontend application source from YorkIE-Launchpad/todo-app.
nodes.description: External submodule referenced by .gitmodules. The actual React/application code lives in this separate repository and is not tracked as files in the parent repo's git index. Clone with git submodule update --init to materialize the frontend source locally.

layers.name: Documentation
layers.description: Project documentation and onboarding materials that describe the repository purpose and structure.

layers.name: Configuration
layers.description: Repository configuration files including git submodule definitions and analysis tooling settings.

layers.name: External Modules
layers.description: Git submodules and external code dependencies referenced but not tracked directly in this repository.

tour.title: Project Overview
tour.description: Start with the root README to understand that todo-app-dev is a development wrapper repository auto-generated for the todo application.

tour.title: Submodule Configuration
tour.description: Examine .gitmodules to see how the launchpad-frontend submodule connects this repo to the actual frontend application at YorkIE-Launchpad/todo-app.

tour.title: Analysis Configuration
tour.description: Review the Understand-Anything ignore configuration that controls which files are included in knowledge graph scans.
